permits.description: The work shall include the gut renovation of the kitchen and baths, selective repair and replacement of damaged finishes, upgrade of electrical systems, plumbing as necessary, new hvac system, new windows and siding, repair the front stairs and covered entry joists and decking and painting.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($572,001); keyword: gut; minor: siding; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: A massive $572,000 gut renovation of the kitchen and bathrooms by a development contractor following a recent purchase price significantly below the current assessed value strongly indicates a professional flip for resale.
